mapper.select:
SELECT t1.id, t1.title, t1.slug, t1.summary, t1.top, t1.status, t1.view_num, t1.publish_time, t1.create_by, t1.create_time, t1.update_by, t1.update_time, t1.delete_time FROM `main_post` t1 INNER JOIN `main_post_tag` t2 ON t1.id = t2.post_id INNER JOIN `main_tag` t3 ON t3.id = t2.tag_id
AND t3.slug IN
#{item}
WHERE t1.status = 1 GROUP BY t1.id ORDER BY t1.create_time desc
